summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Alerian MLP ETF (AMLP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Alerian MLP Infrastructure index, a market-cap-weighted index of publicly-traded energy infrastructure MLPs in the US. AMLP was launched on Aug 24, 2010 and is issued by SS&C.

holdings.infoBox: AMLP is an equity ETF with a total of 16 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sunoco LP stock at 14.42%, Plains All American Pipeline at 13.40%, Energy Transfer LP at 13.36%, Western Midstream Partners at 13.20%, and Enterprise Products Partners at 12.83%.
